CloudFlared UI Cloudflare Console
Cloudflare Local cfui
Checking...

Cloudflare Console

Manage Cloudflare account resources through OAuth. Local cfui tools stay in the separate workspace.

Checking OAuth status...
Relay callback
Local callback

Accounts

Resources

Select an account or zone to load Cloudflare resources.

Tunnel error
Configuration changed. Restart the tunnel to apply.

Tunnel Configuration

Manage your Cloudflare Tunnel connection

Tunnel profiles

Select a tunnel to edit. Each tunnel can be started and stopped independently and may run at the same time.

Paste your tunnel token. Find it at Zero Trust → Networks → Connectors → Cloudflare Tunnels → select your tunnel → Edit → copy from the install command.

Open Cloudflare One
Advanced Configuration

Custom identifier tag shown in the Cloudflare dashboard

Software name shown in the Cloudflare dashboard (restart cfui to apply)

Connection protocol to Cloudflare edge

Shutdown grace period (e.g., 30s)

Preferred connection region

Maximum connection retry attempts

Port for the metrics server

Local IP address to bind for outgoing connections to the Cloudflare edge (optional)

System Logs

Disconnected
System ready. Waiting for configuration...

Remote Tunnel Manager

Manage Cloudflare-hosted ingress rules for any saved tunnel profile.

Disabled
Remote manager configuration

Choose which tunnel profile Remote Tunnel Manager edits.

Your Cloudflare Account ID. Can also be set via CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID or CLOUDFLARE_APP_ID env vars.

Your tunnel's UUID. Changing this loads the tunnel configuration.

API Token is recommended. Blank secret fields keep the saved value.

?
Required Cloudflare API permissions Account · Argo Tunnel · Edit Zone · Zone · Read Zone · DNS · Edit The first three permissions are required for Remote Tunnel Manager and DDNS. Workers R2 Storage Edit is only for optional R2 bucket list/create. S3 WebDAV file access uses the S3 Access Key ID and Secret Access Key configured on the S3 page.

No token saved.

Create at Cloudflare Dashboard → My Profile → API Tokens → Create Token. Select the tunnel permissions here. Add Workers R2 Storage Edit only if you want cfui to list or create R2 buckets.

Your Cloudflare account email address.

No key saved.

Find your Global API Key at Cloudflare Dashboard → My Profile → API Keys.

Public hostnames

Dynamic DNS

Automatically update DNS records when your public IP changes. Reuses Remote Manager API credentials.

Disabled

Configure API credentials first

Set up the Remote Tunnel Manager with your Cloudflare API token before using DDNS.

IPv4 —
IPv6 —
—
DDNS Settings

One URL per line. Each line is a separate source.

DDNS Records
Sync Log
No sync history yet.

MCP Access

Let AI clients operate cfui through the Model Context Protocol.

Disabled
Access tokens
Tokens are shown once when created. The list only shows masked values.

Connect an MCP client to the endpoint below and use a bearer token generated here.


                                
Available tools include status, config update, tunnel start/stop, recent logs, and remote tunnel ingress management.

                            

                        


                        

                            
                            
                        


                        

                            

                                

                                    
                                    
                                

                                

                                    
                                    
                                    
Paste your own token or leave blank to generate a strong one.

                                

                            

                            

                                
                            

                        


                        

                            

                                Copy this token now
                                
                            

                            
                        


                        

                            

                        

                    

                

            


            
            

                

                    

                        

                            
S3 WebDAV

                            
Mount one S3-compatible bucket path as WebDAV and manage files from this page.

                        

                        
                            
                            Setup required
                        
                    

                    

                        


                        

                            

                                

                                    
WebDAV access

                                    
Choose whether WebDAV is served by the main HTTP service or a separate port.

                                

                                
                                    
                                    Main service
                                
                            

                            

                                

                                    
                                    
                                

                                

                                    

                                        

                                            
                                            
                                        

                                        

                                            
                                            
                                        

                                        
                                    

                                    

                                        
                                        
                                        
                                    

                                    

                                        

                                            

                                                
Public endpoint

                                                
Choose what endpoint is shown for WebDAV clients.

                                            

                                            
                                                
                                                
                                            
                                        

                                        

                                            
                                            
                                            
                                        

                                        

                                            

                                                
                                                
                                            

                                            
                                        

                                        

                                            
Cloudflare Tunnel publishing uses the current tunnel profile.

                                            

                                                
                                                
                                            

                                            

                                                
                                                
                                            

                                            
                                        

                                    

                                

                                
If WebDAV login is disabled, anyone who can reach this port can access enabled mounts.

                            

                        


                        

                            

                                

                                    
Mounts

                                    
Each mount has its own S3 credentials, bucket path, WebDAV path, and WebDAV login.

                                

                                
                            

                            

                            
                        

                    

                

            


            
            

                

                    

                        

                            
Sync between S3 mounts

                            
Choose a source object on the left and a target folder on the right.

                        

                        
                    

                    

                        

                            Source
                            
                                
                            
                            Target
                        

                        

                            

                                

                                    

                                        
Source

                                        
/

                                    

                                

                                

                            

                            

                                

                                    

                                        
Target

                                        
/

                                    

                                    
                                

                                

                            

                        

                        

                            

                                
Final target path

                                /
                            

                            
                        

                        
Overwrite will replace files with the same target path. Extra target files are not deleted.

                    

                    

                        
                        
                    

                

            


            
            

                

                    

                        

                            
Sync tasks

                            
Track background sync progress and control active tasks.

                        

                        
                    

                    

                        

                            

                            

                        

                    

                    

                        
                    

                

            


            
            

                

                    

                        

                            
S3 WebDAV setup

                            
Follow the steps to create or edit one S3 WebDAV mount.

                        

                        
                    

                    

                        

                            
                            
                            
                            
                            
                        


                        


                        

                            

                                

	                                    

	                                        
	                                        
	                                        
Shown only inside cfui so you can tell multiple mounts apart.

	                                    

	                                    

	                                        
	                                    

	                                

                                

                                    
                                    
                                

                            


                            

                                

                                    
Create an R2 API token from the R2 console to get the Access Key ID and Secret Access Key. The Secret Access Key is only shown once.

                                    
Direct path: https://dash.cloudflare.com/<ACCOUNT_ID>/r2/api-tokens

                                

                                

                                    

                                        
                                        
                                        
Used to build the R2 endpoint and to call the optional bucket list/create API. Leave it empty to use the Account ID from Remote Tunnel Manager or the local tunnel token.

                                    

                                    

                                        
                                        
                                        
Match the endpoint shown in your R2 Overview page.

                                    

                                

                                

                                    

                                        
                                        
                                        
For R2, use https://<ACCOUNT_ID>.r2.cloudflarestorage.com.

                                    

                                    

                                        
                                        
                                        
Use auto for Cloudflare R2. Other S3 services usually require their documented region.

                                    

                                

                                

                                    

                                        
                                        
                                        
cfui mounts this bucket only. For generic S3, create the bucket outside cfui first.

                                    

                                    

                                        
                                        
                                        
Optional. WebDAV will only see files under this prefix.

                                    

                                

                                

                                    

                                        
                                        

                                            
                                            
                                            
                                        

                                        

                                            

                                                
                                                
                                            

                                            
Use lowercase letters, numbers, dots, and hyphens.

                                        

                                        
                                        
Bucket list/create is optional and needs a Cloudflare API Token with Workers R2 Storage Edit.

                                    

                                

                                
                            


                            

                                
These credentials are used by cfui to read and write objects. They are separate from the WebDAV login below.

                                

                                    

                                        
                                        
                                    

                                    

                                        
                                        

                                            
                                            
                                        

                                        
No Secret Access Key saved.

                                    

                                

                            


	                            

	                                
These credentials are only for WebDAV clients connecting to cfui.

	                                

	                                    
	                                    
	                                

	                                

                                    

                                        
                                        
                                    

                                    

                                        
                                        

                                            
                                            
                                        

                                        
No WebDAV password saved.

                                    

                                

                                

                                    

                                        
                                        
                                        
Must start with /webdav/. Examples: /webdav/my_r2/ or /webdav/qiniu/.

                                    

                                

                                

                                    

                                        
                                        

                                            
                                            
                                            
                                        

                                    

                                

                            


                            

                                

                            

                        

                    

                    

                        
                        
                        
                        
                    

                

            


            
            

                

                    

                        

                            
Features

                            
Enable optional feature tabs. Disabled features stay accessible from this page.

                        

                    

                    

                        

                            

                                
Remote Tunnel Manager

                                
Manage Cloudflare-hosted ingress rules via API.

                            

                            
                        

                        

                            

                                
DDNS

                                
Automatically update DNS records when your public IP changes. Requires Remote Manager.

                            

                            
                        

                        

                            

                                
MCP Access

                                
Let AI clients operate cfui through the Model Context Protocol.

                            

                            
                        

                        

                            

                                
S3 WebDAV

                                
Expose one S3-compatible bucket path through WebDAV. Cloudflare R2 is supported as a provider preset.

                                

                            

                            
                        

                    

                

            

        

    


    
    

        

            

                

                    
Authorization scopes

                    
Select which Cloudflare modules to request for the next sign-in.

                

                
            

            

            

                
            

        

    


    
    

        

            

                

                    
Add published application

                    
Create a public hostname route like the Cloudflare Zero Trust tunnel form.

                

                
            

            

                
                
                

                    
Public hostname

                    

                        

                            
                            
                        

                        

                            
                            

                                
                                
                            

                            
                            
Select a Cloudflare zone or type a domain manually.

                        

                    

                    

                        
                        
                        
Optional path matcher. Leave empty to publish the whole hostname.

                    

                


                

                    
Service

                    

                        

                            
                            
                        

                        

                            
                            
                            
Use host:port for HTTP/HTTPS/TCP/SSH/RDP, a socket path for UNIX, or a status code.

                        

                    

                


                

                    Additional application settings
                    

                        

                            

                                
                                
                            

                            

                                
                                
                            

                        

                        
                    

                

            

            

                
                
            

        

    


    
    

        

            

                

                    
Add DDNS record

                    
Create DNS records that follow the detected public IP.

                

                
            

            

                

                    

                        
                        
                    

                    

                        
                        
                    

                

                

                    

                        
                        
                        
                    

                    

                        
                        
                    

                    

                        
                        
                    

                

                

                    

                        
                        
                    

                    

                        
                        
                    

                

                
Use {IPV4} / {IPV6} for automatic detection, or enter a fixed public IP.

                
            

            

                
                
            

        

    


    
    

        

            

                

                    
Confirm

                    

                

                
            

            

                
                
            

        

    


    
    

        

            

                

                    
Choose language
